<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a company form pdf"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/forms/{form_id}/pdf"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get the link to the form PDF

scope: `company_forms:read`

  id={"request"}
